title: Every Claude Tool Explained: Master Full Ecosystem in 20 Minutes
summary: Overview of Claude's integrated ecosystem covering Chat, Code, Cowork, Design, and Routines. Explains Projects, Custom Instructions, MCP connections, Claude.md documentation, automation capabilities, and design generation features. Positions Claude as an operating system for work rather than a standalone chatbot.
writeup: This video maps Claude's integrated product ecosystem, covering Chat, Code, Cowork, Design, and Routines, and shows how the tools connect across research, coding, team collaboration, design generation, and workflow automation. It frames these as 2026 capabilities and ties them to concepts including Model Context Protocol, prompt engineering, AI agents, and AI-assisted development. The takeaway is an overview of each tool's role and how they combine into a single workflow rather than functioning as separate products.
